programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.desc: Catherine Southon heads to the Royal Mint and finds out how Sir Isaac Newton revolutionized coins to prevent forgers. Phil Serrell gets a lesson in the culture at the Bristol Old Vic and discovers why it's a miracle the building still stands.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Wrest Park in Bedfordshire is the setting for today's roadshow, where treasures include a piece of Murano glass inspired by Picasso and a collection of 1950s advertising posters for Vauxhall cars.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): A punta de pistola
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan asesinatos de líderes comunitarios que parecen crímenes de odio. Frank se reúne con un grupo que busca justicia para las víctimas. Linda es asaltada y decide tomar medidas para aumentar su seguridad.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El pecado de los padres
programme.desc: Frank busca pruebas contra un sospechoso de matar a un policía que disparó a un compañero de Henry hace años. Danny y Baez investigan una serie de asesinatos relacionados con estrellas de cine para adultos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando Morgan es secuestrado, la UAC se apresura a buscarlo y salvarle la vida.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige a Wichita en busca de un sospechoso que secuestra niños mientras sus padres duermen. Además, Morgan está intentando averiguar quién fue el responsable del ataque.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un sujeto ataca a la UAC, el equipo entra en acción para averiguar quién es el responsable.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la ex miembro del equipo de la UAC y actual agente de la Interpol, Emily Prentiss localiza a un asesino en serie internacional, pide la ayuda de sus amigos de la UAC.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Las tranquilas vacaciones de Gibbs en su remota cabaña son interrumpidas por una visita sorpresa de Tobias Fornell y el capitán de la Marina Phillip Brooks, así como una llamada del NCIS pidiendo su ayuda.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de que se encuentra una grabación de 50 años dejada por una víctima de asesinato, el equipo del NCIS intenta exonerar a Ray Jennings, el marine que cumple una sentencia de cadena perpetua por el crimen.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de que el NCIS llega a una escena del crimen de Halloween, Torres reconoce a la víctima como un antiguo amigo de la formación federal de la policía.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de que un mural de un artista callejero y activista es robado, la investigación del NCIS lleva a una conspiración sobre un contratista de la Marina y la seguridad de los mamíferos oceánicos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El pecado de los padres
programme.desc: Frank busca pruebas contra un sospechoso de matar a un policía que disparó a un compañero de Henry hace años. Danny y Baez investigan una serie de asesinatos relacionados con estrellas de cine para adultos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Equipaje
programme.desc: Danny se siente desconcertado cuando descubre que un grupo de veteranos del ejército altamente entrenados son responsables de un robo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Hogar dulce hogar
programme.desc: Jamie involucra a Danny cuando encuentra a un adolescente sin hogar que afirma que su tía fue asesinada por su novio. Mientras tanto, Erin se enfurece cuando McCoy la reemplaza como fiscal en un caso que involucra a un guardia de prisión.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Historias de amor
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan cuando un propietario dispara a un intruso, solo para descubrir que el intruso es un sicario. Además, un joven abogado intenta hacer justicia para su madre, a quien Erin envió a prisión por un cargo de asesinato hace 12 años.

programme.title: How It Really Happened
programme.desc: Aired 10/22/2017. Celebrity designer Gianni Versace was gunned down in broad daylight on the steps of his Miami Beach mansion. Those closest to Versace and his killer Andrew Cunanan, try to unravel the mystery.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 3/26/2023. Mexico City is one of the world’s emerging food destinations, and it’s also Eva Longoria’s second home. Longoria takes us to some of her favorite eating spots, but in this constantly evolving city, there is always more to explore.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/2/2023. In the jungles of Yucatán State, on the eastern edge of Mexico, Longoria explores the home of the ancient Maya, where a fierce pride in that ancestry still permeates every custom and dish, even in the most innovative kitchens.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/9/2023. Travelling to the mountains of Southern Mexico, Longoria discovers the hidden magic of Oaxaca that boasts some of the finest ingredients in Mexico, including chocolate, corn, tomatoes and the much-loved quesillo cheese.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are dumbfounded when a man tries to talk them into taking him to jail. Sparks fly when a driver tries to take his truck on the freeway with only two wheels. Deputies are on guard when they approach a belligerent man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A couple assaults a tow lot employee who won't release their car, a suspicious man catches a patrol's attention, and police detain a carload of suspected shoplifters.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A brokenhearted man sends deputies on a dangerous pursuit through town, officers uncover a weapon during a traffic stop, and a woman is detained for driving a stolen vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man gets Tased while resisting arrest, police interrupt a transaction going down in a parked vehicle, and a man fired from his job vents his anger at a gas station.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: When the cuffs come out, an emotional cyclist gives deputies the runaround. A boyfriend’s honesty saves his girlfriend from going to jail on her birthday. Police investigate a case of road rage involving a possible gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a bizarre slow-speed chase after a suspect’s failure to stop. A woman is pulled over after leaving a known drug house. An officer pursues two illegal drag racers on a public highway.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An ATV driver leads deputies on a wild chase, a woman tries to ditch a bag of hard drugs, and an assault suspect is caught off guard by an incriminating voicemail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect tries to outrun the law by bicycle but can’t out pedal police. A deputy goes undercover to investigate stolen baseballs. A K-9 discovers hidden contraband on a suspect’s most private places.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man on the run with a warrant tries to elude police by busting into a residence and hiding under a blanket, and a fleeing cyclist turns apologetic after being caught.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist wanted by police hides out in his mom's garage, a man won't leave his ex-fiancee alone, and a pregnant woman gets busted for meth possession.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers encounter a restless passenger during a routine traffic stop, deputies track down a shoplifter with a particular taste, and officers respond to a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Carjacking victims flag down officers whom then locate, pursue and acquire the stolen vehicle, and a man admits to officers the car he's driving is stolen.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police catch up to a man with warrants and a history of resisting arrest, a fidgety driver arouses suspicion, and a minor with beers in his pants has to answer to his mom.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police track a possible stolen vehicle, a man upset with his neighbors takes matters into his own hands, and officers try to placate a man holding a knife to his own throat.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Following a brief pursuit, the desperate driver bails out of the vehicle and flees on foot. An officer responds to an assault call. When a dog owner returns home, she's informed of her dog's mayhem and given a verbal warning and citation.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies confront a man holding a knife to his roommate’s neck over a prior argument. A suspect runs from deputies on a warrant charge. Suspected robbers are pulled over by deputies.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers set up a sting designed to capture unsuspecting bicycle thieves. An Officer conducts a routine traffic stop on a vehicle with fraudulent tags. An officer pulls over a vehicle after observing a suspected prostitute enter the vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy tries to cut a guy some slack after his relationship troubles got out of hand. A teenager gets a serious lesson in not drinking while underage. A couple is forced to take a raincheck on their wedding day.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A routine traffic stop leads to a foot chase, a driver found with meth narcs on his passenger who has warrants, and a 17-year-old is caught driving without a permit.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer shows up as Coco the Clown in an undercover sting. The Vice unit conducts a reverse-prostitution sting designed to capture suspected “johns.”

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police have a breakthrough in a burglary case, a man found with drugs in his pants claims the pants are not his, and officers deal with a familiar domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect tries to bargain with officers from a rooftop, a nightclub manager confronts the employee who stole his cash, and a talkative man insists he meant to get arrested.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers deploy a police dog to persuade a reluctant suspect to come down off a roof, and an outdoor birthday celebration is crashed by an alleged drunk driver.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An Officer goes undercover as a prostitute. A woman finds a snake in her home. A man solicits himself to an undercover officer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A high speed vehicular pursuit results in a foot chase. Officers respond to a domestic call involving the residence's girlfriend and her children who destroyed the man's house. Police respond to a domestic violence call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect has a change of heart after he leads police on a pursuit. An Officer discovers sterile syringes and rocks in a suspicious man's pocket after he is stopped and searched. A woman is arrested for stealing C.D's out of a car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A very cooperative car thief tells deputies all about his good fortune. An argument over business leaves one man on the ground with a bloody mouth. The occupants of a truck are oblivious to what deputies find in the backseat.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team battle the flu when they are called upon by DDA Klein to investigate the deaths of several key witnesses for a grand jury case against a dangerous Las Vegas gang.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The disturbing death of a 3-year-old girl has a great impact on Catherine as she searches for clues to her murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Brass and Nick get help from an unlikely source, an incarcerated criminal (Method Man), when investigating two murders that take place in the same apartment building.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team discover several victims who have green blood, leading them to the conclusion that their deaths are somehow connected.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and the CSI team become involved in the world of Hollywood comedy when a diva sitcom star (Sagal) meets an untimely demise while filming her show in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick is accused of murdering a famous Vegas gangster, and even he is uncertain of his guilt or innocence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team comes together after Warrick is shot in a Las Vegas alleyway, on the ninth season premiere.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A hypnotist who uses her powers of persuasion to rob banks becomes the prime suspect in a murder investigation.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a series of victims are found deceased seemingly in the middle of everyday activities, the CSIs must determine what is causing them to remain upright after death.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: During the course of an investigation, the CSIs discover that their victim, a young woman who was murdered and found with several different blood types in her system, is the daughter of a wanted criminal.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team investigates a case involving the world of domination, Grissom pays a visit to Lady Heather to help find some answers.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: After a shooting involving a young boy occurs right in the middle of Koreatown, none of the witnesses will speak to the CSI team investigating the case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The prime suspect in a murder case from 12 years earlier comes to the forefront of a new CSI investigation.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a popular young singer is found dead outside an infamous Las Vegas nightclub, the CSI team uncovers a link between the present day crime and a murder from over 50 years ago.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un fin de semana de spa para algunos de los miembros del equipo de CSI se convierte en una investigación de asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un asesinato en una fiesta elaborada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un asesinato a bordo de un avión que acaba de aterrizar.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de Investigación de la Escena del Crimen es llamado para investigar un choque de autos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga dos casos, cada uno de los cuales podría ayudar a resolver el otro.

programme.desc: Una maestra persuade a un ingeniero para construir una escuela en su pueblo, pero enfrentan la corrupción del alcalde, quien, a pesar de que el ingeniero salva a su hijo, se opone; los habitantes deciden seguir adelante con su plan de construcción.

programme.title: Trainspotting
programme.desc: En una mezcla salvaje de acción rebelde y humor retorcido, cuatro amigos roban y estafan para vivir en un mundo hipercinético de drogas, sexo y rocanrol, y terminan planeando la mayor estafa de todas.

programme.title: East LA Interchange
programme.desc: East LA Interchange follows the evolution of working-class, immigrant Boyle Heights from multicultural to predominantly Latino and a center of Mexican-American culture.

programme.title: Vuelo nocturno
programme.desc: Al poco tiempo de despegar, el compañero de asiento de Lisa, Jackson, le revela la verdadera razón de su presencia. Forma parte de un plan para asesinar a un empresario rico y poderoso...y Lisa es la clave para lograrlo.

programme.title: John Henry
programme.desc: John Henry es un hombre pacífico, con un pasado violento. Cuando dos niños inmigrantes huyen de su ex-líder de pandilla, John Henry aparecen en sus vidas. John se ve forzado a enfrentar su pasado para darles un futuro.

programme.title: El arma secreta
programme.desc: En Nuevo México, el General Leslie Groves (Paul Newman) está a cargo de "El Proyecto Manhattan": el esfuerzo estadounidense de la Segunda Guerra Mundial que producirá dos armas atómicas llamadas "Hombre Gordo" y "Pequeño Niño".

programme.title: Acechada
programme.desc: Una mujer policía recibe un caso en el que descubre que todos los asesinados son antiguos novios.

programme.title: La reina
programme.desc: Intrigante, sincera y cautivadora. La reina muestra una mirada fascinante de la reina Elizabeth II, cuando se encuentra con el primer ministro Tony Blair después de la trágica muerte de la princesa Diana.

programme.title: La mujer de mi hermano
programme.desc: Zoe e Ignacio llevan 10 años casados y la pasión se ha enfriado. Una Zoe sexualmente frustrada se siente físicamente atraída por su cuñado. Las cosas se complican aún más después de que ella queda embarazada y descubre que su esposo puede ser gay.

programme.title: Flirting With Disaster
programme.desc: Del director de American Hustle y Silver linings playbook llega esta ingeniosa comedia con un elenco de estrellas que examina las disfunciones de la vida familiar moderna.

programme.title: Las mujeres perfectas
programme.desc: Después de mudarse con su familia a la comunidad de Stepford, Connecticut, la ex ejecutiva de un canal de televisión en Nueva York, Joanna Eberhart empieza a darse cuenta de que Stepford es demasiado perfecto.

programme.title: El príncipe y yo
programme.desc: Una fantástica historia de amor sobre una estudiante de medicina que se enamora de un príncipe danés que se negó a seguir las tradiciones de sus padres y vino a EE.UU. a rebelarse.

programme.title: Ni en tus sueños
programme.desc: En esta comedia, Kirk, un tipo común, no puede creer su suerte cuando la exitosa y preciosa Molly se enamora de él. Sus amigos listos, su familia loca y hasta su insoportable exnovia están tan conmocionados como él.

programme.title: Flirting With Disaster
programme.desc: Del director de American Hustle y Silver linings playbook llega esta ingeniosa comedia con un elenco de estrellas que examina las disfunciones de la vida familiar moderna.

programme.title: Las mujeres perfectas
programme.desc: Después de mudarse con su familia a la comunidad de Stepford, Connecticut, la ex ejecutiva de un canal de televisión en Nueva York, Joanna Eberhart empieza a darse cuenta de que Stepford es demasiado perfecto.

programme.title: La furia del dragón
programme.desc: La película dirigida por el legendario Bruce Lee está llena de acción y escenas épicas de lucha. Lee visita a sus familiares en el restaurante que tienen en Italia y los ayuda a defenderse de los mafiosos que los hostigan.

programme.title: Puños de furia
programme.desc: Bruce Lee interpreta a Chen Zhen, un artista de artes marciales que regresa a su antigua escuela en Shanghái cuando se entera de la muerte de su amado instructor.

programme.title: Respeto (2012)
programme.desc: Lucas comienza un romance con Jasmine sin saber que antes anduvo con Jacob, uno de sus amigos. Tras sentirse traicionado, Jacob delata a Lucas con el hermanastro de Jasmine y solo provoca la ira entre pandillas.

programme.title: El pacificador
programme.desc: Cuando un tren que transporta ojivas nucleares se estrella en la Unión Soviética, la especialista nuclear Dra. Kelly descubre que el accidente es en realidad parte de un complot para cubrir el robo de las armas.

programme.title: El último desafío
programme.desc: Tras abandonar su puesto en el Depto de Narcóticos de DPLA, el sheriff Ray Owens (Schwarzenegger) se muda y establece en un pueblo tranquilo de la frontera, Sommerton Junction.

programme.title: Perdido en la fama
programme.desc: Un rockero semi retirado y caprichoso (Antonio Banderas) debe espabilarse para rescatar a su esposa, quien ha sido secuestrada mientras se encontraba de vacaciones en Chile.

programme.title: Regreso al infierno
programme.desc: Cuando período de servicio en Irak llega a su fin, cuatro soldados estadounidenses se enteran de que están programados pare emprender una misión final. Una misión profética que cambiará eternamente el concepto que tenían hasta ahora de guerra.

programme.title: Ladron Que Roba a Ladron (LAS)
programme.desc: Un par de ladrones profesionales hallan complicado su plan para robar a un millonario después de que los miembros hábiles del equipo regular rechazan el plan. Los ladrones se verán forzados a contratar a novatos para completar el trabajo.

programme.title: Ladrones
programme.desc: Fernando Colunga y Eduardo Yáñez lideran las risas como los Robin Hoods modernos en esta tremendamente entretenida secuela del gran éxito "Ladrón que roba a ladrón".

programme.title: Stockholm
programme.desc: Una noche, un chico y una chica se encuentran y acaban acostándose juntos, pero a la mañana siguiente ninguno de ellos encuentra a su lado a la persona que creían conocer.

programme.title: El Camino Correcto
programme.desc: Arturo, un niño de la ciudad de El Verde Bonao en la República Dominicana rural, aprovecha las posibilidades que se le presentan al ir a la ciudad con la esperanza de ayudar a su madre, que acaba de ser diagnosticada con leucemia.

programme.title: Argentina, 1985
programme.desc: A legal team takes on the heads of Argentina's bloody military dictatorship during the 1980s in a battle against odds and a race against time.

programme.title: El ardor
programme.desc: Gael García Bernal protagoniza a un misterioso héroe que emerge de la selva argentina para rescatar a una joven (Alice Braga) y al rancho de su familia, de brutales usurpadores de tierra.

programme.title: El Crimen del Padre Amaro LAS
programme.desc: La política y las pasiones sexuales amenazan con corromper a un joven sacerdote recién ordenado en un pequeño pueblo mexicano.

programme.title: La maldición gitana
programme.desc: Un abogado obeso accidentalmente corre y mata a una anciana gitana. Después de que su viejo lo maldice, él comienza a perder peso y no puede parar. Basado en la novela de Stephen King, escrita bajo el seudónimo de Richard Bachman.

programme.title: Día de la madre
programme.desc: Rebecca DeMornay brinda una interpretación aterradora en este baño de sangre brutal. Cuando sus hijos entran a una casa y toman como rehenes a los dueños; ella les enseña cómo es la verdadera tortura. Coprotagonizada por Shawn Ashmore.

programme.title: El juego del duende
programme.desc: Después de que un grupo de ladrones es enviado a cazar leyendas urbanas, roban el oro de un duende, solo para descubrir que hay que pagar un alto precio.

programme.title: La reliquia
programme.desc: Entren, si se atreven. La gala inaugural de una nueva exhibición en el museo de historia natural de Chicago está por comenzar. Pero tengan cuidado porque algo aterrador quiere asegurarse de que nadie pueda irse.

programme.title: Los profesores
programme.desc: Un grupo de estudiantes de secundaria descubren que el cuerpo docente está bajo el control de parásitos alienígenas. Con el guion inteligente de Kevin Williamson “Scream” y dirigida por Robert Rodriguez “From Dusk Till Dawn”.

programme.title: Halloween VI: La maldición de Michael Myers
programme.desc: El pueblo de Haddonfield, Illinois, celebra Halloween por primera vez en cinco años, pero el asesino en masa maníaco Michael Myers se une a las festividades, con su némesis, el Dr. Loomis, un empedernido psiquiatra, pisándole los talones.

programme.title: Halloween: 20 años después
programme.desc: Hace 20 años, el mal escapó bajo la forma de Michael Myers, lo cual llevó a una sangrienta matanza en Halloween. Ahora, Michael ha vuelto para aterrorizar a una nueva generación, comenzando por la sobreviviente Laurie Strode (Jamie Lee Curtis).

programme.title: Querido Dios
programme.desc: Greg Kinnear protagoniza en este espíritu-levantador sobre un estafador que va de nada bueno al hacer el bien.

programme.title: Novocaína

programme.title: Ni en tus sueños
programme.desc: En esta comedia, Kirk, un tipo común, no puede creer su suerte cuando la exitosa y preciosa Molly se enamora de él. Sus amigos listos, su familia loca y hasta su insoportable exnovia están tan conmocionados como él.

programme.title: Los reyes pal palacio

programme.title: Lonesome Dove

programme.title: Lonesome Dove
programme.desc: McCrae and Wood's cattle drive faces deadly situations. Sheriff July Johnson heads to Texas, and former prostitute Lorena is abandoned by Jake and kidnapped by the psychotic Blue Duck.

programme.title: Lonesome Dove
programme.desc: Gus and July save Lorena from Blue Duck, but at a deadly cost. Jake runs with a bad crowd and pays the price. July accepts that his wife has left him and stays on at Clara's with his newborn son.

programme.desc: Maude is given a speeding ticket by an eager young traffic cop who insists she was doing 34 miles per hour in a 30 miles per hour zone. Arthur offers to have the ticket 'fixed,' but Maude will not hear of it and insists on a full court trial.

programme.desc: A woman that is helping to develop a revolutionary new type of television set disappears without a trace, and the company that she works for asks Barnaby to find out what happened to her.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se llama a la policía de las Grandes Llanuras por un cadáver, una verificación de antecedentes de la víctima los lleva a una extraña red de vagabundos sin hogar, subastas de ganado y cheques sin fondos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been raining for days and the team is going a little stir-crazy, but Dog has the cure; a good hunt. Maui has failed to appear on a drug charge and the team has just one lead. She was recently spotted during a bust at a local chop shop garage.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides it's time to outfit the Da Kine crew with new SUVs. After a quick visit to their local dealership, they go after Jasmine, a woman whose criminal record includes over 37 arrests for everything from drug promotion to assault.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The team is still in Colorado, and today Dog starts his day by to giving his kids and crew a sample of their western heritage by taking them horseback riding. This hunt takes Dog back to his old stomping grounds in Denver.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on the back of the fireboat. Contestant will have the option to drink up to three habanero pepper smoothie shots. One contestant will be standing at the top of a fire slide while their partner is standing at the slide-stairs.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Two large platforms are hanging below two helicopters. In this pairs stunt, each contestant will be seated in a barber chair. Contestants will each start out straddling the side of a container, at opposite ends, high in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Stunt takes place in a rectangular pig pen filled with pigs. Couple is placed back-to back and attached to an upright rotisserie. One contestant will be dragged through a field of mud.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be locked to a net that is dangling from the cargo load ramp of a Sikorsky helicopter over the water. Contestants must make their way through a maze. Contestants must climb into the back of a car that is slowly filling with water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant is placed in a coffin, lowered into a grave, and their partner must free them. The contestants will be placed into a 7-foot deep Plexiglas tank divided into two sections and filled with water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: For this Psycho Arc couples stunt, a hearse will be specially fabricated with a standing platform replacing the rear bumper. One contestant will be handcuffed to a shower inside a bathroom at the Bates Motel.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Team of two contestants will be in a four-walled roof-less office- type room that is filled with desks, chairs, filing cabinets, etc. Contestants will be bound in straight jackets and will have amount of time to escape.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Child contestant will be standing on top of the light tower while the parent is hanging from a helicopter. The parent contestant will be peddling a stationary bicycle. The child is standing on the roof and their parent is navigating through a maze.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Two contestants will be driving a boat down a path while connected to a helicopter. Contestants will be on their knees inside a plexiglas tank. Contestants will be standing in a plexi box that is suspended over water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Each couple is standing on the edge of the roof. Contestant will be sealed into a cage filled with roaches. The cage will be locked on the outside. Contestants are driving behind a flatbed and their opponents are releasing barrels to distract them.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on a building ledge as a wind and rain storm inhibits their movement. Contestants must bob their heads into a container to retrieve cockroaches with their mouths. Couples will be on their stomachs on a flash flood set.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: A crane will be driving alongside the edge of a berth with its boom arm extended out over the berth. Contestants will start this stunt by jumping into garbage, retrieving items. 2 contestants will hold onto ski lines connected to the helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants support one another while leaning out over each side of a boat. Each contestant will be lying in a vertical position and rotated head over feet. Each contestant will be in a car and on go will back off the flatbed trucks.

programme.desc: El chef Ramsay está en la Gran Manzana para remodelar Dillon's, un restaurante indio a solo unas cuadras de su próspero restaurante.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita Mount Sinai, Nueva York, para ayudar a arreglar el restaurante y salón Handlebar de Bill y Carolyn LeRoy, que parece que se quedo en la década de 1980.

programme.title: El pescado en el plátillo
programme.desc: El enérgico chef y experto en mariscos Spencer Watts muestra cómo las cortezas y los revestimientos agregan una textura tentadora al rico atún y a las ostras frescas y picantes.

programme.title: El pescado en el plátillo
programme.desc: ¿A quién no le gusta una sorpresa? El chef Spencer Watts, amante de los mariscos, hace de la perca y el cangrejo la estrella oculta en tamales, albóndigas, rollitos primavera y picaduras de jalapeños.

programme.title: El pescado en el plátillo
programme.desc: En el menú, son tendencia los langostinos relucientes y fríos que se derrite en la boca, ya que el chef y experto en mariscos Spencer Watts se pone un poco salado con los platos del mar.

programme.title: El pescado en el plátillo
programme.desc: El chef Spencer Watts muestra cómo la explosión de acidez del limón, la lima, la naranja y la toronja agregan un sabor tentador al suave pez dorado y a las vieiras dulces.

programme.title: El pescado en el plátillo
programme.desc: El chef amante de los mariscos, Spencer Watts, se vuelve casual y formal al mismo tiempo con recetas de rape y almejas que presentan algunas de sus bebidas favoritas: la cerveza y el vino.

programme.title: El pescado en el plátillo
programme.desc: El chef Spencer Watts está haciendo un libro de cocina sobre pescado. Aquí, él cocina algunas recetas de pez espada y vieira que incluyen algunas de sus nueces favoritas.

programme.title: El pescado en el plátillo
programme.desc: Al pescado le encantan las especias y al chef Spencer Watts le encanta el pescado, por lo que trae el delicioso mundo de las especias al pez mantequilla y a la langosta junto con algunos lados refrescantes.

programme.title: El pescado en el plátillo
programme.desc: El chef Spencer Watts comparte algunas de sus recetas favoritas de caballa y mejillón en las que destacan las vibrantes y frescas hierbas aromáticas.

programme.title: El pescado en el plátillo
programme.desc: El esturión y las gambas se encuentran con vinos y licores en la cocina del chef Spencer Watts mientras reúne mariscos y licores en deliciosos brebajes culinarios.

programme.title: El pescado en el plátillo
programme.desc: El chef Spencer Watts presenta deliciosas formas de rellenar con truchas arcoíris y ostras, y cómo usarlas para rellenar un sándwich o incluso un aguacate.

programme.title: El pescado en el plátillo
programme.desc: El chef Spencer Watts nos muestra que los mariscos pueden ser excelentes por sí solos, pero cuando se combinan diferentes tipos, son un gran plato para degustar.

programme.title: El pescado en el plátillo
programme.desc: El chef Spencer Watts se pone en salsa con mariscos. Prepara una salsa de mascarpone y de cangrejo para salmón, y alioli de naranja y mantequilla clarificada para cangrejo.

programme.title: El pescado en el plátillo
programme.desc: La mantequilla y el pescado son los mejores amigos. El chef Spencer Watts trae mantequilla de tocino, mantequilla marrón, mantequilla de arce y mantequilla de chimichurri a esta fiesta de pescado.

programme.title: El pescado en el plátillo
programme.desc: El chef amante de los mariscos, Spencer Watts, parte el pan y los pasteles con bacalao canadiense y calamares para hacer sopa, calzones y dos versiones de calamares fritos.

programme.title: El pescado en el plátillo
programme.desc: El chef Spencer Watts hace que el salmón y las gambas se llenen de sabor mientras trabaja con el ingrediente imprescindible de cualquier cocina de mariscos: deliciosos aceites con sabor.

programme.title: Pescado desconocido
programme.desc: Nuestro chef, Kumar Paredes, inicia la búsqueda del primer pez desconocido en su barrio: el callao. Luego de visitar un mercado en el puerto de Lima, pesca un pez llamado picuda. ¿Pasará este pescado la prueba de frío, calor y fritura?

programme.title: Pescado desconocido
programme.desc: Continúa la búsqueda de peces desconocidos y esta vez llegamos al tradicional barrio de Magdalena. Tras ver la oferta marítima del día, el chef Kumar Paredes decide probar el pez espada.

programme.title: Pescado desconocido
programme.desc: Surquillo es reconocido por tener uno de los mercados más variados de Lima. El chef Kumar Paredes llega a este barrio en busca del pez desconocido del día: cachema.

programme.title: Pescado desconocido
programme.desc: Kumar visita Lince para probar un pescado que mucha gente conoce, pero pocos lo usan. Estamos hablando del bonito. ¿Te atreves a ver que preparan?

programme.title: Pescado desconocido
programme.desc: Kumar fue a Santiago de Surco y había un pez que logró llamar su atención llamado chiri. Lo probará en tres platos diferentes para ver cómo queda. ¡Veamos el resultado!

programme.title: Pescado desconocido
programme.desc: Breña es un distrito reconocido en Lima y nuestro carismático chef Kumar Paredes acudió a uno de los mercados de este distrito en busca de peje blanco. Seamos testigos de esta aventura.

programme.title: Pescado desconocido
programme.desc: Finaliza la primera temporada y volveremos a ver a Kumar en Santiago de Surco. Preparará un pescado en tres platos distintivos llamado fortuno. ¿Funcionará?

programme.title: Pescado desconocido
programme.desc: Kumar está interesado en saber cuál es el sabor de la doncella, así que fuimos a Lince a buscar este pescado y verá que da como resultado tres platos que preparará. ¡Seamos parte de lo que viene a continuación, vamos!

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young couple decided to celebrate their first wedding anniversary with a camping trip to Mount Hood. During the trip, the husband was shot and killed. Later, his wife told two different versions of the events which led to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of 16-year-old Leanne Tiernan was discovered nine months after she disappeared. Forensic scientists found clues that painted a virtual portrait of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman falls to her death from a cliff overlooking the ocean. Initially, investigators think it was a tragic accident. But after a forensic examination, police uncover a very different picture of what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Haunted by the disappearance of her mother, a young woman undertakes an investigation of her own. In her mother's diary, she discovers a dark family secret that might explain the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: California police had several suspects in the robbery and brutal murder of an elderly couple. Ten years later, a determined forensic scientist used material from a dentist's office to uncover ballistic evidence that had been overlooked.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a street fight takes the life of a national wrestling champion, police must determine if he was killed in cold blood or in self-defense.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 19-year-old woman was found dead in her car; the scene had been staged to make murder appear to be suicide. During their investigation, police discovered the victim was involved in a love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man disappears one year to the day after beginning an affair with his friend's wife. 15 years later, with the help of a metal detector, police find evidence that would prove what had happened and who was responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the body of a young woman is found under an isolated highway ramp, a unique fiber on the victim's clothing leads San Diego police straight to the most unlikely of killers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A go-go dancer told her family she needed to get away for a while and then she simply disappeared. Investigators were suspicious, because she took neither her car nor her clothes. 20 years later, her family received a call that changed everything.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Colorado hunter is the victim of a well-planned crime. Investigators suspect two weapons and two killers. But forensic evidence points them in a different direction — one much closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1984, California firefighters battled ten arson fires in three weeks. When cigarettes and a scrap of paper connected the case to similar fires further north, the hunt was on for a dangerous pyromaniac.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2002, a small community in upstate New York was devastated when Patty Wlasiuk died in a truck accident. But burdock seed pods found in her hair and on her clothes indicated that this was no accident — it was cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman disappeared without a trace, there were two possible explanations: kidnapping or murder. Careful investigation, a forensic artist and DNA profiling enabled police to find a single suspect, who was known to prey upon vulnerable women.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Alaskan hikers discover a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Investigators find a tuft of red carpet fibers clinging to the sheet — threads of evidence which lead them straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Prompted by news of a flight attendant's brutal murder, the son of a previous victim contacts police. Both murders have similar MOs, and biological evidence proves that these were serial killings.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A two-man shrimp boat sinks when a fast-moving, violent storm strikes the Louisiana coast. The captain drowns, but the deckhand is rescued fourteen hours later. The crewman is hailed as a hero — until the captain's body is discovered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a wealthy real estate tycoon goes missing, it appears to be foul play. In his will, he leaves instructions in case he should die under violent circumstances — which were carried out after a hiker comes across his bullet-ridden skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murder of an American tourist in a Mexican resort draws law enforcement resources on both sides of the border. At first glance, the motive appears to be robbery, but careful analysis of the forensic evidence points to something more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police are led on a wild goose chase when the wife of a prominent banker is kidnapped. An entomologist's unexpected discovery leads to a new suspect — and the realization that ordinary office equipment can leave extraordinary clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A neighbor watched as a man stabbed his wife, pushed her into the swimming pool and held her head under water. The husband, however, had no recollection of the crime. A jury would have to decide between evidence and the mysteries of the mind.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search when the mother of two young children went missing. Twenty years after her body was found, new technology recontextualized old evidence and pointed directly to the killer.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After five weeks on the road driving across the country, the Ricardos and the Mertzes arrive at their destination – Hollywood. With stars in her eyes, Lucy heads for the Brown Derby, a restaurant frequented by celebrities, with Ethel and Fred in tow.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is jealous when Ricky is asked to pose with five beautiful starlets for publicity photos and tries to get herself in on the action by inserting herself into every shot. Lucy is even more upset when Ricky goes to his first Hollywood premiere.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is desperate to appear in a Hollywood movie after hearing the Mertzes have bit parts in an upcoming feature. She sets out to be "discovered" and lands a part in an MGM musical. She plays a showgirl in a glamorous nightclub scene but has some trouble.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy convinces Ricky to allow her to buy a Don Loper dress so she'll fit in with the Hollywood scene. Lucy and Ethel hit the couturier's salon but soon realize the dresses are way out of their price range.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy arrives in Hollywood with Little Ricky to meet her husband and his new press agent, who intends on making Ricky the "Cuban Liberace." Charlie Pomerantz plans a publicity stunt he hopes will get Ricky into Hedda Hopper's gossip column.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy learns her husband's film Don Juan will be shelved and works frantically with the Mertzes and Mrs. McGillicuddy to prevent it from happening. Together they write hundreds of fan letters and dress up as members of the Ricky Ricardo Fan Club.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy has agreed to write an article entitled "What It's Like To Be Married To Ricky Ricardo" for a magazine when she learns from Ricky's press agent that Ricky is going to host a TV show. Lucy desperately wants to appear on the show with Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky forgot the date of his 15th anniversary and desperately wires the records department in Greenwich, Connecticut where they were married to find out. In his defense, Ricky tells Lucy that he's already planned a big "surprise" anniversary party.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy learns a movie star, Cornel Wilde, is staying in the penthouse directly above the Ricardos' apartment and sets out to catch a glimpse of the handsome actor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ricky, and Fred and Ethel are fed up with each other's annoying habits and decide they all need a break. They split up for a brief vacation and Lucy and Ethel decide they'll go to Palm Springs for a girls-only good time.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's friend Caroline Abbleby decides she'll pay Lucy a visit while on her way to Hawaii, and can't wait for Lucy to introduce her to all the stars she has supposedly befriended. Lucy's only solution is to trick her friend and set the stage for deceit.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Caroline Appleby is visiting from New York and is excited to see all the stars Lucy had promised. Of course Lucy exaggerated her access to celebrities but plans on fooling her nearsighted friend.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides that Ricky needs an agent to negotiate more money and cut down on his fruitless personal appearances, so she appoints herself. Her fast talking, no-nonsense actions result in the studio canceling Ricky's contract.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Although Ricky is having lunch with Richard Widmark, he refuses to introduce Lucy because she has become a legend around Hollywood for her crazy escapades.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos are going back to New York in one week and Lucy is determined not to leave Hollywood with the proper souvenirs. She's already got a box full of memorabilia but she still wants more.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy, while souvenir collecting, lifted a cement block with John Wayne's footprints from Grauman's Chinese Theatre, and now a newspaper is reporting that she was seen and her arrest is imminent.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Chip Jackson of MGM asks Ricky to perform at a party but he refuses in favor of a deep-sea fishing retreat. Lucy has a better idea - she tells Mr. Jackson that Ricky would be glad to appear.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky makes a little money by selling his car, he forgets to tell his New York neighbors who drove out with him to Hollywood that he will buy their return train tickets.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy, unaccustomed to train travel, is sure her trip to New York will be filled with intrigue and romance. When she hears that a jewel thief is on board, she sees herself as the possible heroine of the situation despite Ricky's admonitions to leave.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: On their return from Hollywood, Lucy has her hands full with Ricky when he is hailed as a major celebrity. The Ricardos' neighbors join for a grand homecoming celebration and block party in Ricky's honor when the Ricardos and Mertze return together.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky Ricardo's new fame leads to an invitation to appear on a television interview program. The live interview is to take place in their home and Ricky's new agent wants them to move to a more posh apartment.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky cannot help Fred out by performing at his lodge show because he is already booked for a radio show that day. Lucy volunteers to help out so she and Fred whip up a Western act. Ricky discovers it's a rodeo show that he's booked for, not a radio show.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky finds Lucy exhausted after a trying day with little Ricky and insists it is time their son started nursery school. Lucy's protests are overridden and Ricky takes young Ricky to nursery school, but the baby comes down with tonsillitis.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is offered a European booking that is too important to refuse but he can't afford to take Lucy with him. Lucy is furious at the prospect of being left behind, and when Ricky wants to take Fred Mertz along as the tour manager, Ethel too, is incensed.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is unable to produce her birth certificate to get a passport for the Ricardos' and Mertzes' European jaunt. She calls her hometown for the birth certificate but discovers that none exists for her.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Fred's fear of becoming seasick threatens the Mertzes' and Ricardos' plans for Ricky's European band tour. They are all booked on the ocean liner Constitution for the trans-Atlantic voyage.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes are on the deck of the Constitution, ready to set sail for Europe when Lucy rushes down the gangplank for one last goodbye to Little Ricky who will be in her mother's care while she is away.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: Wale enlightens us on his passion for his career which results in many sleepness nights. T-Pain gives an insider's view of his travels and why he creates a plethora of music.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: Young Jeezy separates fact from fiction gangster style. Lloyd Banks gives new insight behind his inspiration to be a rapper who performs with such unforgettable raw intensity.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: Legendary Snoop Dogg talks about his songs and making music that feels and sounds good. Sexy newcomer Elle Varner opens up about her past as a singer and songwriter promoting positivity.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: Ciara reveals why she likes to give die-hard fans exactly what they want in her albums and how her confidence has grown tremendously over the years. Ne-Yo provides an eye-opening interview on taking his film writing career to the next level.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: Robin Thicke talks about creating music, getting out on the road performing, family life, and believing in yourself. J. Cole confesses to scheming as a young adult to get ahead to doing jail time before signing with Jay-Z.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: Big Sean talks about his vision resulting in headlining amazing sold-out concerts. B.O.B. tells the story behind his celebrity name and how the music industry is a corporate business.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: Nicki Minaj talks about her career from doing explosive underground mixed-tapes to Lil Wayne bringing her on to a record deal. Boy band Mindless Behavior takes the stage: these four guys reveal how traveling helps them create their music.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: Soul singer Eric Benet and young Canadian dinger Melanie Fiona talk love, regret, and the inspiration for their searing music that resonates with fans all over the world.

programme.desc: Usher, one of the most private artists in the industry, opens up about his personal life and what really happened between him and Tboz.

programme.title: Islands in a Desert Sea
programme.desc: Explore the rich, biodiverse Sea of Cortez, where survival hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Wild Pacific Rescue
programme.desc: Follow the team in healing and releasing a grumpy sea turtle, and then meet a sea lion with an unusual injury that must be taken by crane to the rescue centre. Find out how the vet aids an aging fruit bat and a community rescues a one-eyed seal pup.

programme.title: Kenya Wildlife Diaries
programme.desc: Lewa Conservacy is working to protect the Grévy's zebras population.

programme.title: Siberia's Wild Year
programme.desc: Only the hardiest animals are capable of carving out a life in Siberia. From the ice-covered shores of the north, across miles of barren tundra, to the depths of the taiga forest, animals must face incredible challenges and fight for survival.

programme.title: Untamed Albania
programme.desc: Admire a stunning range of animal life in southeastern Europe's hidden Eden.

programme.title: Hotspots
programme.desc: Borneo, the third-largest island in the world, houses hundreds of species of mammals, amphibians, and fish.

programme.title: Hotspots
programme.desc: The many habitats of one of Australia's most diverse areas plays home to an array of bird species.

programme.title: Hotspots
programme.desc: Climbing up into the cloud forest and peeking inside a waypoint for migrating birds.

programme.title: Whale with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve encounters the largest and most sophisticated hunters on the planet; he reveals the ingenious strategies used by whales that gets extraordinary predators in trouble.

programme.title: Islands: Nature's Wild Laboratories
programme.desc: Off the eastern coast of Australia lies K'gari, also known as Fraser Island; it is the largest sand island in the world where every meal is hard won; there's a tropical rainforest on top of the dunes.

programme.title: Alien Abyss
programme.desc: Feeling the love in the strange-but-heartwarming partnerships between some of Earth's oddest creatures; diving deep to see strange animals, from snapping shrimp to wolf eels, offer a hand to their fellow ocean-going weirdos to ensure mutual survival.

programme.title: Life in the Blue
programme.desc: Swim amongst the amazing biodiversity just under the surface of the open ocean.

programme.title: Shadowlands
programme.desc: New Zealand's dark fjords harbor creatures normally found in the deep; as winter approaches, bottlenose dolphins must escape their freezing fjord, while in a mountain river, a longfin eel heeds the call of the sea.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Wolf and Rose are a cool hitmen duo with the ambition of rising to the top of the hitman business by killing Lupin. They capture Goemon and torture him to confess about Lupin's weaknesses. Lupin learns that Goemon is in danger.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The chief of the police department accused of mismanagement on Lupin's release, hit the prime minister out of anger and was dismissed. Zenigata thinks that Lupin is the only arrest to avenge the chief's death, and starts an operation.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The painting "The First Supper" hides clues to an heirloom that Christ received from Virgin Mary. This painting has been kept by the clan of Judah for generations, and a woman named Nova knows where the painting is hidden.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Mona Lisa never leaves the Louvre Museum. Arsène Lupin tried unsuccessfully to steal her and Lupin III wants her for his collection, however, and fireworks ignite between him and Zenigata in charge of security.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: On New Years Eve, Lupin is after is the Golden Treasure Ship at Mount Horai. It's said that the Seven Lucky Gods conferred this treasure, which is shown in public only once a year when the New Year's bell rings at the belfry of Kohoji Temple.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: As usual, Lupin is tossed to and fro by Fujiko. But a man named Buckingham comes to him and sells him "disguise chewing gum" for 50,000 dollars.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The island of Rabaul has many remains of Japanese casualties of the Pacific War. It's said that Captain Cook's secret treasure is hidden there, worth 1-billion pounds. Lupin and gang are after this treasure but they get attacked!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and gang break into the Bank of Stockholm but as usual, Fujiko tries to take the money all for herself. Lupin goes after her but she gets injured in an avalanche. She confesses to Lupin about the location of her most precious treasure…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and friends search a month for the pirate Kid's treasure, but they are thwarted by an underground organization called the Red Ghost. Knowing something is afoot, Lupin sends Fujiko and Goemon to investigate.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin finds a piece of paper in a silk hat, an heirloom of Arsène Lupin. It's information regarding an opal statue of Venus, and since Lupin figures its ownership is his birthright, he heads to Gregoire's castle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Zenigata acquires a pie-throwing gun, and is ordered to capture Lupin. Meanwhile, Lupin and Fujiko are discussing Napoleon's treasures. It's said that the key to solving the mystery of their whereabouts lies in a scarf made by Napoleon's assistant…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The young girl Francoise lives near Lupin; she watches Lupin and Fujiko talking, and falls for him. But her father scolds her and tells her to stay away from thieves, but Francoise devises a plan to approach Lupin anyway…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Professor Pancho has devoted his life to solving the problem of food supply. Lupin decides to help them out and invents a rocket that flies on corn fuel, thinking that maybe he and Fujiko will take a trip to the moon…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is blackmailed; Fujiko has been kidnapped, and for ransom he must steal a jeweled crown worth 100 million dollars. Lupin and friends head to the museum where their objective lies.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lady Black and Fujiko have a bet. Whoever kills Lupin will get the loser's entire jewelry collection. Lady Black lures Lupin using Fujiko so she could kill him, but why is she so passionate about wanting him dead?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Boss Largo wants Lupin dead; Lupin had just stolen a bundle of the boss's casino profits. But no run of the mill hitman would suffice to wack Lupin. But Largo sees that Lupin is suffering from a toothache, and gets an idea.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin reads the morning paper, which says that Lupin stole a 100-karat diamond that was being used in a musical. He knows he didn't do it, so he asks Fujiko and others, but they too have no idea what it's all about.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The nation of Janaica is troubled with coup d'etats and revolutions, but Lupin, discovering that the president's mansion houses the missing painting "Nude Venus," decides to go scope the joint with Jigen.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The master of surrealism, Monsieur Daré had spent three years working on his masterpiece, but news is out that the great object of art got stolen.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Three incidents of bank robbery have happened; a total of 1.3 billion yen was stolen. A man calling himself Goemon is the culprit and he even sends Lupin a challenge, but Goemon wants to settle the score by himself.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin's stash of Napoleon's cash got stolen, but Lupin catches the culprit and tries to make him confess. Turns out he's only one of the followers of the Fandar cult, and heads to their holy land of Fandara.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin learns that a treasure trove lies in a volcano on Cleo Island, but it can only be reached when the mountain isn't spewing molten lava! He tries to convince Jigen and Goemon to join him but they're not interested.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko informs Lupin that fine quality diamonds from South Africa are stored in a safe of a global syndicate and importer of diamonds. Lupin makes his way as a worker in the boiler room, and steals the loot of diamonds.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin finds out about the jewel "Poison Trio" of the Borges family and decides to steal it after Fujiko goads him. Galdan, the nephew of Lucricia greets Lupin, and tells him that elderly Lucricia had been arrested and must be broken out of jail.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin goes on a safe-cracking rampage and rakes in 10 million francs. He needs the money to purchase the world's only rare Gold Butterfly at an auction. But Lupin drops the 10 million francs while on the run…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin scopes a jewelry museum where the billion-dollar gem Cleopatra's Tear is displayed. But Lupin can't get to it because the display case is secured by high-voltage electricity.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: No thief has ever succeeded in stealing the secret gem of Pompeii's nunnery; it's guarded by venomous snakes. Even Arsene Lupin gave up on it, since he hates snakes. But Lupin takes on the challenge. Will Lupin succeed? And what kind of secret gem is it?

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: While planting a seed, Mister Rogers talks about how long it takes for plants to grow and that learning to wait is important. He also shows a video about how people make orange juice.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film of a bird family, and an origami artist demonstrates how to make paper birds and puppets. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, a puppet couple, Betty and James, adopt a baby daughter.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits pediatrician Dr. Jane Breck, who shows young viewers what might happen during a child's routine checkup. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Cousin Mary Owl plans a cousin reunion!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers talks about how children are curious about families that are formed by adoption and talks about his family's adoption of his own sister. He shows a film about different families in his Neighborhood.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At Chef Brockett's bakery, Eva Kwong's grandmother makes special Chinese dumplings, and Mister Rogers talks about how children can learn about so many things from adults.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows how people make wooden rocking horses. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Mr. Aber gets a mask that makes him look like King Friday, and the Neighbors talk about the importance of making and keeping friends.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows viewers a kitten named Jimmy and a film of Jimmy's birth, and assures viewers that "it's all right to wonder about things." Then, poet and essayist May Sarton visits.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers invites viewers along on a visit to a special new playground designed and built by both adults and children. He makes up a song at the piano.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a toy factory where people make plastic molded tricycles, and he receives a visit from folk singer Ella Jenkins who collects toy tops from around the world.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows how empty containers plus some imagination can create a whole Neighborhood. In Make-Believe, Ana Platypus is jealous of Prince Tuesday's new bike and angry because her parents aren't buying one for her.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a toy lending library and sees children playing with different kinds of toys. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Prince Tuesday learns to ride his bike, and also learns to share it!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Naruto

programme.desc: Timmy desea un lavado de coche mágico que hará que el carro de su padre se vea nuevo; a Wanda le preocupa que Poof no interactúa con otros bebés hadas.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Vicky, la niñera de Timmy, es despedida y encuentra un nuevo trabajo como la alcaldesa malévola de Dimmsdale.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy intenta ayudar a Catman a encontrar trabajo seguro; la madre de Timmy transforma su casa en un hotel.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy intenta frustrar los planes de sus padres para su fiesta de cumpleaños. Timmy descubre que su madre quiere pasar tiempo con él.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy se embarca en una aventura para buscar a sus hadas y a su varita mágica.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy va en una aventura para buscar sus padrinos mágicos y una varita mágica que derrotará a el Darkness.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy descubre que él debe viajar hasta el otro lado del universo para recoger una segunda varita que le permita derrotar a la Oscuridad.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy se entera de que debe viajar al otro lado del universo para recoger una segunda varita que permitirá derrotar a el Darkness.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy regresa a Dimmsdale para encontrar que su casa es una ilusión; Timmy viene con un nuevo plan para derrotar a el Darkness.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: As the girls continue to have problems accommodating Charlotte as a mermaid, Nate bullies Lewis. Despite the girls’ attempts to keep Charlotte under control, she uses her powers on Nate and almost exposes them all.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: Charlotte takes over and organises a surprise party for Lewis, annoying Rikki. At the party, Charlotte is jealous of Cleo and traps her and Emma in a pool room. Rikki comes back just in time. From now on, Charlotte is on her own.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: Cleo is bullied by Charlotte and runs away to the ocean. With Cleo missing, everyone becomes more and more worried. Lewis discovers what Charlotte has been up to and breaks up with her. He finds Cleo and they kiss.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: The full moon rises, and with the planets lining up, it can remove mermaid powers for good. Knowing this, Lewis lures Charlotte to the moon pool but it backfires and Emma, Cleo and Rikki all look set to lose their powers.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: The Awakening
programme.desc: Cleo and Rikki face their final year of high school without Emma. They make a new friend in Bella and meet new boy Will – and encounter a strange new force on Mako Island that turns water against them.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Jungle Hunt
programme.desc: Will seeks confirmation of his first experience on Mako Island. Bella volunteers to misdirect his search so he won't find the Moon Pool. The girls and Lewis discover the Moon Pool has changed.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Keep Your Enemies Close
programme.desc: Cleo seeks a new job as an assistant dolphin trainer at the Marine Park. Rikki fires Nate's band from playing at the cafe until she and Bella reach an understanding.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Valentine's Day
programme.desc: Cleo is forced to put Lewis' plans for romance on hold to restrain Kim's out-of-control love life. During this time, Don meets Samantha, a National Parks manager, and they start dating.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Big Ideas
programme.desc: Zane concocts a dirt bike race to publicize the café. When Rikki discovers it's a scam, she and Bella decide to teach him and Nate a lesson. Cleo and Lewis make a major discovery about mixing the waters in the Moon Pool.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Bella attempts to start a relationship with Will until she sees he's apparently got another girl. Lewis tests the magic Moon Pool water at school and attracts the attention of their Science teacher.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Happy Families
programme.desc: A problematic family beach picnic leads Don to end his relationship with Samantha, until Cleo encourages him to pursue it. Will's sister, Sophie, competes with Bella for a job at the café and sets her sights on Zane.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Kidnapped
programme.desc: Rikki and Bella hide out at Cleo's to protect themselves from a full moon water attack. However, Bella is kidnapped by a water tentacle and taken to Mako Island. Lewis tries to keep Will away from the island so the girls can rescue her.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: The Sorcerer's Apprentice
programme.desc: Cleo defies Lewis' advice and experiments with the magic Moon Pool water. Using her powers, Rikki accidentally gets the water into Cleo's aquarium and all the girls have to rescue Cleo's fish Hector.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Revealed
programme.desc: Bella's warned to back off from Will as he's on the trail of the girls' mermaid secrets. She gets too close to him and he finally discovers she's a mermaid.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Just a Girl at Heart
programme.desc: Bella helps Will with his free-diving training but when she realises he's more interested in her as a mermaid than a girl, she's hurt. Rikki and Cleo have to improvise when the cafe's first corporate function is actually a children's party.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: Rikki receives counterfeit money at the café and is held captive by criminals on a boat. Bella and Cleo are forced to reveal the trio's secret to Will, so they can rescue Rikki together.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: To Have and to Hold Back
programme.desc: Kim attempts to derail Don and Samantha's wedding. Lewis receives an opportunity to study in America. Cleo realises she's got to let Lewis live his own life and let him go overseas.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Mermaid Magic
programme.desc: Will pushes himself too far when Zane challenges him to prove his skills as a free-diver. The girls discover a unique crystal in the rock from the Moon Pool.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Power Play
programme.desc: Sophie uses Bella's idea for a fundraising concert and presents it as her own to Rikki to gain publicity for the café. Cleo's caught in the crossfire with Kim when Samantha moves in and puts her stamp on the Sertori home.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: The Dark Side
programme.desc: Rikki's frustrated by the water attacks and goes to Mako Island on a full moon to confront the strange force in the Moon Pool. With Cleo and Bella delayed, Will pursues her and discovers she's been affected by the experience.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: A Magnetic Attraction
programme.desc: Cleo's introduced to Ryan, a young geophysicist who's working for Samantha. Rikki doesn't react well to Cleo consulting Ryan about the Mako rock and a fracture begins to appear in the trio.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Into the Light
programme.desc: Rikki fears Ryan's explorations on Mako Island will uncover their secrets but Cleo and Bella discount her concern. She almost goes too far trying to stop Ryan from discovering the crystals in the Moon Pool.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Breakaway
programme.desc: Will competes in the Free-Diving Championships but afterward chooses to break from the sport and shrug off Sophie's influence on his life. Rikki sees Sophie kissing Zane at the event and breaks off their relationship.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Queen for a Day
programme.desc: Zane installs Sophie as head of staff at the café. Bella develops a sneezing allergy that also accidentally triggers her powers. Sophie seizes on the problem and looks to fire Bella and the band.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: The Jewel Thief
programme.desc: The girls discover the Mako crystals contain immense energy and need to mount a rescue mission when Zane jealously steals one in an effort to gain Rikki's attention.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Mako Masters
programme.desc: The girls sit their final school exams and have to avoid a water attack in public when the full moon rises early. They confront the water force in the Moon Pool and are given a message about Mako Island.

programme.desc: These denying dads swear there's no way they're the father! These moms need to prove them wrong. The only thing that's missing is the truth! DNA results don't lie, but after the results are read, who will be left looking for more answers?

programme.desc: John aspires to be a rapper and says Dabria wants to trap him with someone else's baby due to his future success. Then, can a mom keep her daughter away from her controlling boyfriend? Later, is Kelly's very sick baby Brandon's?

programme.desc: Veronica wants to prove that Willy fathered her child, but he believes the many rumors about her infidelity! Then, did Adam or Ryan father Heather's child? Adam's the father on paper, but her husband Dave wants him to sign over his parental rights!

programme.desc: Ashley and DeNorris accuse each other of cheating. Later, Jim denies serious allegations with his fiancee's sister and other young girls.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Deshawn claims that his ex Lynette abandoned their 5 year old son. But she claims that he is keeping her from their child. However, Deshawn recently found out that he isn't listed on his son's birth certificate, so he wants a DNA test!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Eugene believes that Shannon cheated on him that he has even broken into her home to setup recording devices. Next, Deontae left Kapreece after she had her baby and denied fatherhood. Will the lie detector results mend or break these relationships?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Chris claims that Brianna's very controlling and doesn't let him go out to do the things that make him happy. Then, Chad is here to propose to his girlfriend Star but before they book the caterer, Star has a little confession to make.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Anita is ready to dump her husband for her ex-lover. Next Theresa is cheating on her fiancé with his brother! Later Kevin is here to ell his girlfriend's ex, Jermaine, to back off.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Today's guests say that they can get anything worth having with their bodies. These women admit to being ruthless and cold-hearted to get what they want.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: James is engaged to Amanda but now comes clean about Melanie. Next Jewel competes for her mistress' love when Christa proclaims that she wants the lover for herself!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Beep runs a convenience store and he's fallen in love with the girlfriend of one of the patrons. Next James has been waiting for 5 years to take his revenge on his brother. Then Michelle has a shocking experience with a shocking person!

programme.desc: Hoy, en MAURY, terminó la espera. Finalmente mostramos los resultados emocionantes de las pruebas de paternidad de ayer. Además, las nuevas parejas están cruzando los dedos para recibir las respuestas que quieren.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Los invitados del episodio de hoy de MAURY tienen secretos que revelar, pero ¿se arrepentirán de contarlos? Hay relaciones en peligro. Puede que haya corazones rotos. ¿Podrán estas parejas sobrevivir a los secretos que amenazan con separarlos?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Hoy en MAURY, tenemos a madres y padres muy enfadados en negación. ¡Estos hombres juran que es imposible que sean los padres de los hijos de estas mujeres! Pero, ¿y si tienen razón? ¿Qué respuestas darán los resultados de ADN?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Devon entró en coma y está conectado a un sistema de soporte vital. Antes de caer en coma, le dijo a su madre que su ex, Alisha, le dijo que no era el padre de su hijo. Alisha niega haber dicho esto y siente que toda su familia le ha dado la espalda.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Monique quiere probar que Chris la atacó cuando la llevó a casa después de una fiesta. Chris niega haber hecho algo malo y dice que Monique estaba demasiado borracha como para ser consciente de lo que pasó.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Kelsey dice que su marido la maltrata. Malcolm cree que Kelsey le ha sido infiel desde el principio y que sus dos hijos pueden ser de otro hombre. Además, el novio de Carrie, Chris, cree que su hijo es de su ex.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Curtis se sentó con su madre Telisha, y le dijo que está tratando de tener un bebé, pero Telisha se horrorizó y se preocupó porque Curtis apenas tiene 13 años. Curtis asegura que está listo para ser padre.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
